description: Legal document. In Arabic script. There are two witness signatures. It may be a debt contract involving a sum of 5 dīnārs (l. 3), that will be paid in two installments over the period of two years. The first in 511 H and the second in 512 H. Also includes the iḥḍār of a man called Sulaymān b. Badr al-Jamālī.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
